creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Do you use KDE? What version?

I use GNOME2, all ports fully updated.

> I'll try to truss this, but I don't think there's much we can do about it.
> And no, I have no idea why skype would try to access the video device
> to open a browser :)

Alright. Perhaps we need to propagate the bug report to the upstream and
hope for the best.
